environmentNotes: Environment is Windows (win32 10.0.26200). Electron version 34.5.8 is installed and executable binary is valid. App was running earlier today (timestamp in logs shows 10:38:26 - 10:50:28) but has since closed. Current state shows no process listening on port 9222.
